scripts._get_ngrok_url: curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels | node -pe 'JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8")).tunnels[0]?.public_url || (console.error("No ngrok tunnel running. Start one with: npm run expose"), process.exit(1))'
scripts.expose: trap 'kill 0' EXIT; npx serve -l 8080 -s . & ngrok http 8080 > /dev/null & until curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels 2>/dev/null | grep -q public_url; do sleep 0.2; done; URL=$(npm run -s _get_ngrok_url); printf %s "$URL" | pbcopy; echo "Copied: $URL"; open "$URL" https://simkl.com/settings/developer/edit/61491 https://trakt.tv/oauth/applications/195099/edit; wait
scripts.open: URL=$(npm run -s _get_ngrok_url) && printf %s "$URL" | pbcopy && echo "Copied: $URL" && open "$URL"
